---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new module, flag, or capability
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## The shop workflow problem

Describe the workflow that's currently painful, slow, or impossible. What are you trying to accomplish when you reach for iUSB? Where does the friction happen?

The strongest feature requests start here, not with the proposed feature.

## The proposed feature

Describe what you'd like iUSB to do. A new module? A new flag? A change to the report layout? A new integration?

## How you'd use it

A concrete example. "When a customer brings in a desktop with their data on an external drive, I'd want iUSB to..."

## Alternatives you've considered

Other tools, scripts, or workarounds you've tried. Why are they insufficient?

## How often does this come up?

- [ ] Multiple times a day
- [ ] A few times a week
- [ ] A few times a month
- [ ] Rarely, but it's a high-pain situation when it happens
- [ ] First time, but I expect it to recur

## Tier

If this is Pro or Enterprise tier in your view, say so. If it should be in the free Community edition, say that.

- [ ] Community (free, open source)
- [ ] Pro (paid, cloud-enhanced)
- [ ] Enterprise (volume, SSO, on-prem)
- [ ] Not sure

## Anything else
